title: Provider contract: nightlights NTL feed (v1)
description: VIIRS night-time light point samples covering a city bounding box, sourced from NASA Black Marble VNP46A2, EOG VIIRS monthly composites, or a synthetic fallback. Each record is one sampled NTL point with its lat/lon, radiance in nW/cm²/sr, lit fraction, and provenance. The ingestor aggregates these points to H3 cells and derives ECONOMIC_ACTIVITY_INDEX, DATA_CONFIDENCE, and ACTIVITY_CLASS.

provider_id.description: Stable identifier for the data provider (e.g. 'nasa_black_marble', 'eog_viirs_monthly', 'synthetic_fallback').

source_name.description: Human-readable source name (e.g. 'NASA Black Marble VNP46A2', 'EOG VIIRS Monthly Composite').

source_type.description: How the NTL data was acquired.

bbox.description: Bounding box for which NTL samples were collected.

samples.description: Array of individual NTL point samples covering the bbox.

lat.description: Latitude of the sample point in decimal degrees (WGS84).

lon.description: Longitude of the sample point in decimal degrees (WGS84).

radiance_nw.description: VIIRS Day/Night Band radiance in nW/cm²/sr. Null indicates no-data.

lit_fraction.description: Fraction of sub-pixels above the 0.3 nW/cm²/sr lit threshold (0–1). Optional.

quality_flag.description: Data quality at this sample point. 'void_filled' means gap-filled; 'cloud_contaminated' means cloud cover reduced quality.

source_record_id.description: Optional tile or pixel identifier from the source dataset for traceability.

collected_at.description: ISO-8601 acquisition or composite period start date.

ingested_at.description: ISO-8601 datetime when AirOS ingested this record.
